changelog: CHANGE: CDN proxy fee is now $50 CAD / year (was $40). All lock-screen, license-detail and renewal copy updated to the new price.

FIX: When you open Live TV, Movies or Series with sidebar layout, the cyan focus ring now lands on the CURRENTLY-SELECTED category — not always on the first row (Favorites). The visual selection state and the D-pad cursor now match.
FIX: Same selection-aware focus restore on layout flip (top-bar ↔ sidebar).
